title: Enigmatic 3D
description:
A resourcepack for Enigmatic Legacy that gives 3D models to:

The Acknowledgement,
The Twist,
The Infinitum,
Guide to Animal Companionship,
Guide to Feral Hunt,
Non-Euclidean Cube
